import os, re, random
import pyarrow.parquet as pq
from pyarrow.parquet import ParquetFile
random.seed(42)
os.makedirs('work', exist_ok=True)
pf = ParquetFile('data/train-00000-of-00001.parquet')
schema_names = pf.schema.names
# Heuristics to choose label and text columns
label_candidates = ['label','stars','rating','sentiment','class','score','stars_review']
text_candidates = ['text','review','content','sentence','review_text','body','comment','message']
aux_title_candidates = ['title','summary','headline']
label_col = None
text_col = None
aux_col = None
low_names = [n.lower() for n in schema_names]
for c in label_candidates:
    if c in low_names:
        label_col = schema_names[low_names.index(c)]
        break
for c in text_candidates:
    if c in low_names:
        text_col = schema_names[low_names.index(c)]
        break
for c in aux_title_candidates:
    if c in low_names:
        aux_col = schema_names[low_names.index(c)]
        break
if text_col is None:
    # if there is both 'title' and 'text' variants, or if only aux exists, use aux
    if aux_col is not None:
        text_col = aux_col
    else:
        # fallback: pick the longest string-like column from first batch
        batch = next(pf.iter_batches(batch_size=64))
        tab = batch.to_pandas()
        cand = None; best_len = -1
        for col in tab.columns:
            if tab[col].dtype == object:
                s = tab[col].astype(str).str.len().mean()
                if s>best_len:
                    best_len = s; cand = col
        text_col = cand
# If still missing label, try to find integer category-looking columns
if label_col is None:
    batch = next(pf.iter_batches(batch_size=256))
    tab = batch.to_pandas()
    for col in tab.columns:
        if str(tab[col].dtype).startswith('int') or str(tab[col].dtype).startswith('int64'):
            # check small number of unique values
            nunique = tab[col].nunique(dropna=True)
            if 2 <= nunique <= 10:
                label_col = col
                break
if text_col is None or label_col is None:
    print('Could not determine text or label columns:', 'text_col=', text_col, 'label_col=', label_col)
    raise SystemExit(1)
print('Using columns -> label:', label_col, ', text:', text_col, ', aux:', aux_col)
train_path = 'work/train.txt'
valid_path = 'work/valid.txt'
train_f = open(train_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8')
valid_f = open(valid_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8')
count = 0
val_count = 0
for batch in pf.iter_batches(batch_size=5000):
    tab = batch.to_pandas()
    lbls = tab[label_col]
    texts = tab[text_col].astype(str)
    if aux_col and aux_col != text_col and aux_col in tab.columns:
        texts = tab[aux_col].astype(str) + ' ' + texts
    for lbl, txt in zip(lbls, texts):
        if lbl is None or (isinstance(lbl, float) and (lbl != lbl)):
            continue
        s = str(txt).replace('\n', ' ').strip()
        if not s:
            continue
        lab = str(int(lbl)) if re.fullmatch(r"[-+]?\d+", str(lbl)) or isinstance(lbl, (int,)) else str(lbl).strip()
        line = f"__label__{lab} {s}\n"
        if random.random() < 0.1:
            valid_f.write(line)
            val_count += 1
        else:
            train_f.write(line)
            count += 1
print('Wrote train:', count, 'lines; valid:', val_count, 'lines')
train_f.close(); valid_f.close()
